title: Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator from Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, or other countries where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are restricted, you're likely tired of dealing with payout delays and limited options. You've probably tried alternative payment processors like NOWPayments, and while they help, they still don't provide the level of automation and control you need to run a smooth digital business. You're not alone, and this post will walk you through a more reliable and efficient solution to sell digital products without the hassle of conventional payment processors.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, for instance, allows you to sell digital products, but its payout delays can be frustrating, especially for creators who rely on timely income. PayPal, on the other hand, is limited in its availability, excluding numerous countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, where creators are desperate for alternatives. NOWPayments, as a payment processor, provides a wide range of coins and no KYC requirements, but it still lacks the automation and delivery capabilities that a dedicated e-commerce platform can offer. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) offers frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins, making it a more attractive option for creators in restricted countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, Gumroad's limitations are well-documented, while PayPal's restrictions are a major pain point for creators in countries like Nigeria and Ghana. NOWPayments, as a payment processor, doesn't have the same country restrictions as PayPal, but it still requires creators to set up individual accounts for each buyer, which can be time-consuming and cumbersome. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) offers a seamless and automated experience for creators in restricted countries, allowing them to focus on what matters most – creating and selling digital products.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed is another critical factor to consider, especially for creators who rely on timely income. Gumroad's payout delays can be frustrating, while PayPal's fees can add up quickly, especially for smaller transactions. NOWPayments offers competitive fees, but creators still need to manage individual accounts and transactions, which can be time-consuming. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), on the other hand, provides instant automated delivery and no fees for creators, making it a more cost-effective option for creators in restricted countries.
Gumroad's payout delays can be catastrophic for creators who rely on timely income.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for creators who want to run a smooth and efficient digital business. Gumroad's limitations make it difficult to automate delivery, while PayPal's restrictions can lead to delivery complications. NOWPayments offers some automation features, but creators still need to manage individual accounts and transactions. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), however, provides instant automated delivery, making it the most reliable option for creators in restricted countries who want to focus on creating and selling digital products.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Gumroad, PayPal, NOWPayments, and Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a more reliable and efficient solution to sell digital products without the hassle of conventional payment processors, Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) is the clear winner. Its automation and delivery capabilities, combined with its seamless experience for creators in restricted countries, make it the perfect choice for creators who want to focus on what matters most – creating and selling digital products.
